app.name: Messenger
keyboard.filter.title: Filter
keyboard.text.title: Input
chat.offline: SYSTEM: {{npc}} is offline. Message could not be sent.
chat.usage.no-refill-note: When daily usage left is 0, credit wont be refill
profile.title: Profile
profile.avatar-warning:
Only square photo
can be used
as avatar.
notification.usage-check-failed: === Smartphone ===^^Failed to check AI usage for 3 times in a row, AI usage is temporarily disabled.^^Try restart your game and check mod page for support. HaPyke!
notification.usage-limit-reached: === Smartphone ===^^AI usage reached its limit. Chat and StardewSocial are temporarily disabled.^^This will be reset the next day in timezone UTC+0. HaPyke!
notification.usage-high-downgrade: === Smartphone ===^^Usage is very high today, AI quality is temporarily downgraded so I won't go bankrupt lol.^^This will be reset the next day in timezone UTC+0. HaPyke!
config.language.name: Language
config.language.tooltip: Enter your prefered language and alphabet. However English is the best supported.
config.disable-daily-message.name: Disable Daily Message
config.disable-daily-message.tooltip:
If enabled, the `Good morning...` option will be disabled.
You should keep this option False which overtime will help the AI understand what is lore of the character.
config.show-image-tags.name: Show Message Image Tags
config.show-image-tags.tooltip: Shows attached image tags when hovering photo bubbles in the Text app.
config.show-ai-credit.name: Show AI Credit
config.show-ai-credit.tooltip:
You have a limited number of usage of the AI features each day when no key is provided.
This option shows how many usages you have left. Check it at Messages -> NPC -> AI Credit.
config.page.ai-settings.tooltip: API key, model choice, and limits setting.
config.page.custom-api.tooltip: Call to your own API endpoint. Check out Forum for instruction.
config.page.ai-settings.title: AI Settings
config.page.ai-settings.desc: These settings are only effective when an API key is provided. You can use your own OpenAI or Gemini key. When using custom API, key and model options here have no effect.
config.key.name: Key
config.key.tooltip:
Use your own OpenAI or Gemini key to remove shared usage limits.
OpenAI key: https://platform.openai.com/account/api-keys
Gemini key: https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey
Restart the game after changing this value.
config.model.name: Model
config.model.tooltip:
Chooses the model.
Of course if you using OpenAI key, you should choose OpenAI model and vice versa for Gemini key.
config.characteristic.name: NPC characteristic detail
config.characteristic.tooltip:
NPC characteristic give the AI a background for each NPC during the chat and the post generation.
Higher detail improves quality but uses more tokens per NPC.
config.max-summary.name: Summary max words
config.max-summary.tooltip:
Conversation are summarized daily so the AI knows what the previous conversation is about.
Higher limit means AI will `remember` more details but will use more tokens.
Memory saved at "Userdata\SaveFolder\summary".
config.page.storage-limits.title: Storage and Limits
config.new-message-chance.name: New message chance
config.new-message-chance.tooltip: Chance to receive a new message from NPCs.
config.max-message.name: Messages per NPC
config.max-message.tooltip: Older text messages are removed first when this limit is exceeded.
config.photos-to-keep.name: Player photos to keep
config.photos-to-keep.tooltip: Older player photos are deleted first.
config.page.custom-api.title: Advance - Custom API
config.page.custom-api.desc: When using this advance setting, key and model selection on regular AI setting will be override. See mod page for instruction how to use these settings.
config.custom-endpoint.name: Custom API Endpoint
config.custom-endpoint.tooltip: URL endpoint for a custom API (leave empty to use default providers).
config.custom-key.name: Custom API Key
config.custom-key.tooltip: Key for your custom API endpoint.
config.custom-header.name: Custom API Key Header
config.custom-header.tooltip: HTTP Header name for the API Key.
config.custom-prefix.name: Custom API Key Prefix
config.custom-payload.name: Custom API Payload Template
config.custom-path.name: Custom API Response JSON Path
config.custom-path.tooltip: JSON path to extract response text.
config.custom-timeout.name: Custom API Timeout Seconds
